title: fimbristylis capillaris
intro: Fimbristylis capillaris, also known as Hair Grass or Sedge, is a type of flowering plant native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia and Australia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Fimbristylis capillaris include treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as reducing inflammation and pain. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it can also be dried and used in herbal teas or tinctures.
